title: Replace role system with project/project-local discovery
description: Replace contributor/maintainer role detection, global fallback, and redirect system with convention-based project/ and project-local/ discovery. Implement downward discovery, optional .taskulus paths, local/shared filtering, local create/promote/localize, init folder changes, and scope-aware list/ready output.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added initial @wip Gherkin for convention-based discovery in specs/features/discovery/project_discovery.feature.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Note: storage format remains JSON. The earlier YAML reference was a mistake; do not change issue storage format.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: All child tasks complete and verified; features and implementations for project/project-local discovery, local routing, init, and scoped output are in place with 100% Python coverage and passing Rust cucumber.
